title: Serum Protein Profiling of Patients at Risk to Develop Gastric Disease Based on a DSC Test.
snippet: At present, the gold standard for gastric cancer (GC) confirmation relies mostly on histopathology, an invasive procedure. Noninvasive detection methods using serum for large-scale screening may be useful for the early diagnosis of GC.(HP) infection and chronic atrophic gastritis are major GC risk factors. We recently developed a noninvasive test called the...
